x-enumeration-literals.name: Chargeback Immediate Application
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Chargeback is applied as soon as the dispute is approved.

Comment:
Cardholder disputes €150; account credited immediately after approval.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Chargeback Provisional Application
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Chargeback is applied provisionally while the dispute is under investigation.

Comment:
€200 provisional credit issued pending merchant response.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Chargeback Scheduled Application
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Chargeback is applied at a predefined future date or batch cycle.

Comment:
All validated chargebacks for the week are applied every Friday.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Chargeback Event-Driven Application
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Chargeback is applied triggered by a specific event in the workflow.

Comment:
Chargeback applied automatically after network approval via Visa or Mastercard.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Chargeback Reconciliation Application
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Chargeback is applied during the end-of-cycle account reconciliation or settlement.

Comment:
Example:
Monthly batch of disputed subscription fees posted on the last day of the month.
